use_cases: Display user profile pictures in social or community features
Show user avatars with online/offline status indicators in chat or collaboration tools
Display member thumbnails in team dashboards or user directories
Render author avatars in blog posts, comments, or review sections
Show user avatars in navigation headers or account menus
ai_summary: A versatile Avatar component system built with Radix UI primitives and Tailwind CSS. Provides multiple sub-components for displaying user profile images with fallback initials, status indicators (online, offline, busy, away), and customizable styling via class-variance-authority. Designed for applications requiring user representation across various industries including SaaS, e-commerce, and social platforms.
